bottom_line: S03 introduced lint/format debt in 5 E2E test files that cascaded into 15+ QV-gate fix cycles; add a mandatory lint+format pre-flight in backend-impl steps to prevent propagation.
coverage_notes: S01 log (1.7 KB): full. S03 run1 empty; run2 (2.5 KB): full. S06-S09 logs: full (<3 KB each). S10 (414 KB): tail -100. S11 (438 KB): tail -50. S12 (86 KB): tail -100. S13 (279 B): full. S14 browser logs (7.6 KB + 1.4 KB): full. S14_fix1 (2.4 KB): full. DB telemetry: not used (file-only mode).

findings.title: S03 lint/format debt cascaded into 15+ QV-gate fix cycles (S06-S09)
findings.recommendation: Add make lint + make format-check as mandatory pre-flight in every backend-impl step's own execution loop, before the step self-reports success. The S04 reviewer found the first E501 but 4 remaining issues propagated to QV gates. Update the review checklist in skills/iw-ai-core-testing to require the reviewer to confirm lint+format clean for ALL new test files introduced in the step.
evidence: ai-dev/logs/F-00088_S08_fix1.log — 'make format-check fails; multi-line string reformatted'
ai-dev/work/F-00088/reports/F-00088_S04_CodeReview_report.md — S04 found E501 at line 73 but 4 remaining issues not caught before QV pipeline
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-incident Add mandatory lint+format pre-flight gate to backend-impl step templates; S03 lint debt cascaded into 15+ fix cycles in F-00088 (see ai-dev/work/F-00088/reports/F-00088_self_assess_report.md). Target files: skills/iw-ai-core-testing/SKILL.md, ai-dev/templates/Feature_Implementation_Template.md. Effort: M.

findings.title: S14 V6 async-snapshot race caused hard-to-diagnose htmx_fragments browser failure
findings.recommendation: Refactor playwright_wrapper.py snapshot() to return the DOM content as a return value instead of writing to disk and reading back; eliminate the async-file-write race that causes _read_latest_snap_yml() to read stale yml files. Update all journey callers that currently rely on the side-effect file read.
evidence: ai-dev/logs/F-00088_S14_run5.log:1 — 'snapshot identical before/after Cancel click — V6 test failure root cause'
ai-dev/logs/F-00088_S14_fix1.log:2 — 'async file write timing — _read_latest_snap_yml() reads stale yml file; pw.click('') silently no-ops'
ai-dev/logs/F-00088_S14_fix1.log:2 — fix replaced fragile dynamic ref extraction with hardcoded stable ref (e107)
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-incident Refactor playwright_wrapper.py snapshot() to return DOM content directly, eliminating async-file-write race; caused hard-to-diagnose V6 failure in F-00088 (see ai-dev/work/F-00088/reports/F-00088_self_assess_report.md). Target file: tests/e2e/playwright_wrapper.py. Effort: M.

findings.title: S03 wait_for_sse_chunk() TypeErrors flagged in S04 but not caught before S14
findings.recommendation: Elevate runtime TypeError findings (missing method arguments) from MEDIUM_FIXABLE to HIGH in the review checklist. Add a Python import-time check to the step quality gate: run python -c 'import tests.e2e.<journey_module>' for each new journey to catch signature mismatches at lint time rather than browser-execution time.
evidence: ai-dev/work/F-00088/reports/F-00088_S04_CodeReview_report.md — 'MEDIUM_FIXABLE: wait_for_sse_chunk() missing stream_output positional argument; test_journey_code_qa_sse.py:79,100'
ai-dev/logs/F-00088_S14_run5.log:1 — 'V3 Journey 3 — Code Q&A SSE: PASSED' — TypeError apparently not triggered at runtime
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-incident Add import-time type-check to step quality gate; S03 wait_for_sse_chunk TypeError was MEDIUM in S04 review but should be HIGH (see ai-dev/work/F-00088/reports/F-00088_self_assess_report.md). Target: skills/iw-ai-core-testing/SKILL.md. Effort: S.
